syntax_2807.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2807.title: Send Web Request
syntax_2807.description:
Submits an HTTP request to the given URL.

* `[%string%]` is the HTTP method to use to send the request. If omitted, defaults to "get".
* Headers must be in the format "Header-Name: Value".
syntax_2807.syntax_pattern:
send [a[n]] [http] [%string%] [web] request to [the] [url] %string% [with [the] header[s] %strings% [and [the] body %string%]
send [a[n]] [http] [%string%] [web] request to [the] [url] %string% [with [the] body %string% [and [the] header[s] %strings%]]

en:
Submits an HTTP request to the given URL.

* `[%string%]` is the HTTP method to use to send the request. If omitted, defaults to "get".
* Headers must be in the format "Header-Name: Value".

syntax_2808.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2808.title: Last Response
syntax_2808.description: Returns a httpresponse object that contains information from the last completed [http request](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=2807).

en: Returns a httpresponse object that contains information from the last completed [http request](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=2807).

syntax_2809.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2809.title: Response Code
syntax_2809.description: Returns the status codes of one or more http responses.

en: Returns the status codes of one or more http responses.

syntax_2810.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2810.title: Response Message
syntax_2810.description: Returns the status messages of one or more http responses.

en: Returns the status messages of one or more http responses.

syntax_2812.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2812.title: Response Headers
syntax_2812.description:
Returns the headers of one or more http responses in the format **`"Header-Name: Value"`**.

Multiple http responses may be passed to this expression, but the resulting headers will be combined into a single list with no way to associate each header with its original httpresponse.

en:
Returns the headers of one or more http responses in the format **`"Header-Name: Value"`**.

Multiple http responses may be passed to this expression, but the resulting headers will be combined into a single list with no way to associate each header with its original httpresponse.

syntax_2813.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2813.title: Response Header Keys
syntax_2813.description:
Returns the header keys (names) of one or more http responses. This expression is best used in conjunction with [Response Header Values](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=2814).

Multiple http responses may be passed to this expression, but the resulting keys will be combined into a single list with no way to associate each key with its original http response.

en:
Returns the header keys (names) of one or more http responses. This expression is best used in conjunction with [Response Header Values](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=2814).

Multiple http responses may be passed to this expression, but the resulting keys will be combined into a single list with no way to associate each key with its original http response.

syntax_2814.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2814.title: Response Header Values
syntax_2814.description:
Returns the header values of one or more http responses. This expression is best used in conjunction with [Response Header Keys](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=2813).

Multiple http responses may be passed to this expression, but the resulting values will be combined into a single list with no way to associate each value with its original http response.

en:
Returns the header values of one or more http responses. This expression is best used in conjunction with [Response Header Keys](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=2813).

Multiple http responses may be passed to this expression, but the resulting values will be combined into a single list with no way to associate each value with its original http response.

syntax_2815.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2815.title: Specific Response Header Value
syntax_2815.description:
Returns the values of a specific header for one or more http responses.

Multiple http responses may be passed to this expression, but the resulting values will be combined into a single list with no way to associate each value with its original http response.

en:
Returns the values of a specific header for one or more http responses.

Multiple http responses may be passed to this expression, but the resulting values will be combined into a single list with no way to associate each value with its original http response.

syntax_2816.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2816.title: Response Body
syntax_2816.description: Returns the bodies of one or more http responses.

en: Returns the bodies of one or more http responses.

syntax_2817.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2817.title: URL Safe Text
syntax_2817.description: Converts a text into a text safe for usage in URLs. This can be useful for injecting user input into a URL (e.g. when using a search api).

en: Converts a text into a text safe for usage in URLs. This can be useful for injecting user input into a URL (e.g. when using a search api).

syntax_2818.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_2818.title: JSON Safe Text
syntax_2818.description: Converts a text into a text safe for usage in JSON strings. This can be useful for injecting user input into a JSON payload (e.g. when using a search api).

en: Converts a text into a text safe for usage in JSON strings. This can be useful for injecting user input into a JSON payload (e.g. when using a search api).
